subject: session date
fact: The session date is January 19th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Jan 19th, 2026

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass is a yugoloth who has entered into a binding contract with the party.
source_quote: You have entered into a binding contract with the yugoloth Maram il Vass

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass states that Felkur does not know what he stole or why he is being pursued.
source_quote: Maram il Vass discovers that Felkur doesn't even know what he stole and why he is being pursued

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass asks Felkur if he has any idea what he has done.
source_quote: "Do you have any idea, Felkur, what you've done?"

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen is a rival of Maram il Vass.
source_quote: currently held by his rival, Vraxen

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen currently possesses the Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: currently under the possession of Vraxen

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen is supposed to be monitoring the situation for Graz'zt.
source_quote: Vraxen is supposed to be monitoring the situation for Graz'zt

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur has learned the truth of his past regarding a stolen item.
source_quote: Felkur has finally learned the truth of his past

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur thought he stole a random trinket.
source_quote: Felkur thought he stole a random trinket

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur accidentally tripped the most sophisticated anti-divination ward in the multiverse.
source_quote: you accidentally tripped the most sophisticated anti-divination ward in the multiverse

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur sold the Watcher's Eye Brooch for forty pieces of silver.
source_quote: "bauble" you sold for forty pieces of silver

subject: Felkur
fact: The Brotherhood of Cloaks believes Felkur is a Level 20 Wizard or a chosen of Mask.
source_quote: must be a Level 20 Wizard or a chosen of Mask

subject: Felkur
fact: The Brotherhood of Cloaks thinks Felkur is the leader of an 'Army'.
source_quote: they're still looking for the 'Army' they assume you must lead

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak is the archwizard and ruler of Szith Morcane.
source_quote: "I am Solom Ned'razak, archwizard and ruler of Szith Morcane

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak reunited with the party at the drow encampment at Sporedome.
source_quote: Upon returning to the drow encampment at Sporedome, you reunited with Solom Ned'razak

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak thanked the party for recovering Xaven Tanor'this.
source_quote: Thank you for recovering Xaven Tanor'this from the palace of Maram il Vass

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak views himself as indispensable to the drow's survival.
source_quote: viewing himself as indispensable to the drow's survival

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak considers the adventurers important but replaceable.
source_quote: considering the adventurers "important but replaceable"

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak refuses to join the party directly.
source_quote: Solom refuses to join the party directly

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak stated that every demon-blooded pest is going to pay for what they did.
source_quote: every demon-blooded pest is going to pay for what they did

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak explained what a portable hole is to Daein.
source_quote: Solom explains what a portable hole is to Daein

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is a collaborator of Solom Ned'razak.
source_quote: Solom and his collaborator, Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this was recovered from the palace of Maram il Vass.
source_quote: recovering Xaven Tanor'this from the palace of Maram il Vass

subject: Hledh
fact: Hledh is a giantess who commands heavy guards in Maerimydra.
source_quote: heavy guards commanded by the giantess Hledh

subject: Brotherhood of Cloaks
fact: The Brotherhood of Cloaks has spent thousands of gold pieces on divination rituals.
source_quote: The Brotherhood of Cloaks has spent thousands of gold pieces on divination rituals

subject: Brotherhood of Cloaks
fact: The Brotherhood of Cloaks has executed three High Inquisitors for failing to find Felkur.
source_quote: They've executed three High Inquisitors for 'failing' to find a master infiltrator

subject: demon-powered giants
fact: Demon-powered giants are occupying the city of Maerimydra.
source_quote: demon-powered giants occupying the city

subject: demon-powered giants
fact: The demon-powered giants are probably at each other's throats with Vraxen.
source_quote: Vraxen and the demon powered Giants are probably at each other's throats

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Maerimydra is being supported by Graz'zt.
source_quote: Maerimydra is being supported by Graz'zt

subject: Maerimydra
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is located in Maerimydra.
source_quote: The book is in Maerimydra

subject: Sporedome
fact: Sporedome is a drow encampment where the party reunited with Solom Ned'razak.
source_quote: drow encampment at Sporedome

subject: Pathway of the Shadows
fact: The Pathway of the Shadows is a secret tunnel known only to Solom and Xaven Tanor'this.
source_quote: secret route known only to Solom and his collaborator, Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Pathway of the Shadows
fact: The Pathway of the Shadows leads directly into the Shattered Tower inside Maerimydra.
source_quote: leads directly into the Shattered Tower (Solom's former center of study) inside Maerimydra

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: The Black Ember Outpost is a fire giant stronghold built over a hidden tunnel.
source_quote: Black Ember Outpost, a fire giant stronghold built over a hidden tunnel

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: The Black Ember Outpost is located four miles from Maerimydra.
source_quote: four miles from the city

subject: Shattered Tower
fact: The Shattered Tower was Solom's former center of study.
source_quote: Shattered Tower (Solom's former center of study)

subject: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning is a basalt tower with a green-glowing teleportation circle at its apex.
source_quote: basalt tower with a green-glowing teleportation circle at its apex

subject: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: Felkur intends to recalibrate the teleportation circle in The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning for the party's escape.
source_quote: Felkur intends to recalibrate for your escape

subject: Moonsea
fact: The Brotherhood of Cloaks considers the security of the Moonsea to have been struck by a surgical strike.
source_quote: surgical strike against the security of the Moonsea

subject: Astral Plane
fact: The Brotherhood of Cloaks has scoured the Astral Plane.
source_quote: They've scoured the Astral Plane

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is a tome of great significance.
source_quote: Lexicon of Oaths, a tome of great significance

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is the book the party agreed to secure.
source_quote: They have agreed to secure a book - The Lexicon of Oaths

subject: hourglass
fact: Maram il Vass handed an hourglass to the party.
source_quote: Maram il Vass hands an hourglass to the party

subject: hourglass
fact: The hourglass represents the time the party has left to find the Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: represents the time they have left to find the Lexicon of Oaths before they run out of time

subject: Watcher's Eye Brooch
fact: The Watcher's Eye Brooch is a symbol of power that Felkur stole.
source_quote: stole a symbol of power: The Watcher's Eye Brooch

subject: Watcher's Eye Brooch
fact: The Watcher's Eye Brooch allowed its possessor to be undetected.
source_quote: A power of the brooch was to allow it's possessor to be undetected

subject: portable hole
fact: Solom Ned'razak explained the concept of a portable hole.
source_quote: explaining the alphabet of the multiverse to a man who hits things for a living

subject: demons
fact: Solom Ned'razak refers to demons as 'demon-blooded pests'.
source_quote: "demon-blooded pests" supported by Graz'zt

subject: contract signing
fact: The party entered into a binding contract with Maram il Vass.
source_quote: You have entered into a binding contract with the yugoloth Maram il Vass

subject: distraction strategy
fact: Maram il Vass suggests creating a massive distraction by inciting a conflict between Vraxen's administration and the demon-powered giants.
source_quote: Maram suggests creating a massive distraction by inciting a conflict between Vraxen's demonic administration and the demon-powered giants

subject: Felkur's revelation
fact: Felkur learned he stole the Watcher's Eye Brooch instead of a simple trinket.
source_quote: he did not steal a simple trinket, but the Watcher's Eye Brooch

subject: Solom's task
fact: Solom Ned'razak presented a task to the party to purge the demonic taint from the region.
source_quote: Solom requires the blood of a living fire giant that has been infused with fiendish essence

subject: infiltration plan
fact: The party decided to use a secret route known as the Path of Shadows instead of a frontal assault.
source_quote: Instead, you will use a secret route known only to Solom and his collaborator, Xaven Tanor'this

subject: travel to Black Ember Outpost
fact: The party must travel to the Black Ember Outpost to access the tunnel.
source_quote: You must travel to the Black Ember Outpost

subject: recalibrating teleportation
fact: Felkur intends to recalibrate the teleportation circle at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: Felkur intends to recalibrate for your escape

subject: time limit
fact: The party has a limited amount of time to secure the Lexicon of Oaths before the window of opportunity closes.
source_quote: exact time remaining to secure the book before your window of opportunity closes

subject: demon blood purge
fact: The party must obtain the blood of a living fire giant infused with fiendish essence to purge the region.
source_quote: Solom requires the blood of a living fire giant that has been infused with fiendish essence

subject: escape plan
fact: The party needs to reach the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning to leave the city.
source_quote: To leave the city, you must reach The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Sporedome
fact: The party arrives at Sporedome to meet Solom Ned'razak.
source_quote: The party arrives at Sporedome where they meet Solom Ned'razak

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this hurries the characters to the encampment.
source_quote: Xaven Tanor'this hurries the characters to the encampment

subject: drow
fact: Several drow welcome Xaven Tanor'this at the encampment.
source_quote: where he is welcomed by several of the drow

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak steps forward wearing a fresh set of finely crafted purple robes trimmed with silver.
source_quote: wearing a fresh set of finely crafted purple robes trimmed with silver

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak remembers the party from his rescue from Szith Morcane.
source_quote: Solom remembers them from his rescue from Szith Morcane

subject: research session
fact: Solom Ned'razak and Xaven Tanor'this head to a large tent to do research.
source_quote: Solom and Xaven head to a large tent to do research

subject: elapsed time
fact: The party spends two days in Sporedome.
source_quote: The party spends two days in Sporedome

subject: interruption of Solom
fact: The party interrupts Solom Ned'razak after the first day.
source_quote: the party wants to interrupt Solom Ned'razak. They do

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak becomes furious when interrupted.
source_quote: he's furious

subject: recruitment attempt
fact: The party attempts to recruit Solom Ned'razak.
source_quote: The party attempts to recruit Solom

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak rejects the party's offer to join them.
source_quote: He rejects their offer

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak states he is indispensable to survival.
source_quote: explaining that he's indispensable to survival

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak claims he will find other adventurers if the party dies.
source_quote: If they die, he will find other adventurers

subject: mushroom hunt
fact: The party goes after the mind protecting mushrooms found previously in Sporedome.
source_quote: the party goes after the mind protecting mushrooms that they found last time in Sporedome

subject: mushroom discovery
fact: The party finds a lot more mind protecting mushrooms than expected.
source_quote: They find a lot more. Surprisingly

subject: Daein
fact: Daein complains that the need for a store has gone now that they are heroes of Hillsfar.
source_quote: Daein complains that now that they are heroes of Hillsfar, the need for a store has gone

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak is the leader of the drow.
source_quote: Solom Ned'razak, leader of the drow

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak states they need the blood of a living fire giant to complete a ritual.
source_quote: We need the blood of a living fire giant in order to complete the ritual

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this trails behind Solom Ned'razak and wrings his hands nervously.
source_quote: Behind him trails Xaven, nervous judging by the number of times he wrings his hands

subject: ritual explanation
fact: The ritual to remove demon taint requires the blood of a living fire giant with fiendish blood.
source_quote: specifically one with the blood of a fiend coursing through its veins

subject: map of Maerimydra
fact: Solom Ned'razak provides the characters a map of Maerimydra that is slightly outdated.
source_quote: Solom provides the characters a map of Maerimydra- -albeit slightly outdated

subject: Hledh
fact: Hledh is a powerful fiendish giantess who is the leader of Maerimydra.
source_quote: their leader, a powerful fiendish giantess named Hledh

subject: fire giants
fact: The fire giants keep the gates of Maerimydra heavily guarded and locked at all times.
source_quote: keeps the gates heavily guarded and locked at all times

subject: Shattered Tower
fact: The archmage built a secret tunnel out of the Shattered Tower.
source_quote: The archmage built a secret tunnel out of the Shattered Tower

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this worked with the archmage in the Shattered Tower when Maerimydra was a drow city.
source_quote: Xaven worked with the archmage in the city's Shattered Tower

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is the only survivor of Maerimydra who knows of the secret entrance.
source_quote: Xaven is the only survivor of Maerimydra that knows of the secret entrance

subject: Kurgoth Hellspawn
fact: Kurgoth Hellspawn and the fire giants demolished the Shattered Tower.
source_quote: Kurgoth Hellspawn and the fire giants demolished the Shattered Tower

subject: city takeover
fact: The fire giants took over Maerimydra a century ago.
source_quote: when they took the city over a century ago

subject: secret tunnel exit
fact: The secret tunnel exited into the Underdark four miles from Maerimydra.
source_quote: The tunnel exited into the Underdark four miles from Maerimydra

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: The fire giants built an outpost at the tunnel exit without realizing its significance.
source_quote: the fire giants built an outpost at the exit without realizing the significance of their construction

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: Black Ember Outpost is one of several outlying strongholds the fire giants use to maintain control over the region.
source_quote: Black Ember Outpost, the name of the outpost over the tunnel,  is one of several outlying strongholds the fire giants use to maintain control over the region

subject: secret tunnel entrance
fact: The tunnel is found in the southern-most portion of a large pool beneath the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: The tunnel is found in the southern-most portion of a large pool beneath the outpost

subject: tunnel status
fact: Solom Ned'razak hopes the tunnel has not been blocked by time or the giants.
source_quote: Solom hopes that it has not been blocked by time or the giants

subject: demon threat discussion
fact: Solom Ned'razak explains that demon-infused fire giants would likely destroy the Overbright.
source_quote: Solom explains that the demon infused fire giants would likely destroy the Overbright

subject: Daein
fact: Daein and the rest of the party agree to help after remembering the danger of demonically empowered Fire Giants.
source_quote: Daein and the rest of the party remembers how dangerous a few Fire Giants are, never mind demonically empowered Fire Giants and agree

subject: second recruitment attempt
fact: Daein tries to get Solom Ned'razak to join the party.
source_quote: Daein tries to get Solom to join them

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak rejects the offer because he is essential while the party is replaceable.
source_quote: Solom rejects the offer because he is essential, whereas they are important but replaceable

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak notes he did not become powerful by taking the wrong kind of risks.
source_quote: Solom also notes that he didn't become this powerful by taking the wrong kind of risks

subject: plan alignment
fact: The party learns that the plan to save Felkur and the plan to find the Fire Giants can work together.
source_quote: they learn it can

subject: capture plan
fact: The party proposes a plan to shrink the giant, stuff it in a portable hole, and add a breathing apparatus.
source_quote: They propose a plan to shrink the giant, stuff in a portable hole and add a breathing apparatus to the portable hole

subject: demon blood clarification
fact: The party learns not all giants are imbued with demon blood.
source_quote: They learn not all giants are imbued with demon blood

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: Solom Ned'razak observes there is a tower called The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning that has a portal.
source_quote: Solom observes there is a tower, The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning, that has a portal

subject: portal
fact: The portal has a green light glowing from it that was visible to all.
source_quote: The portal had a green light glowing from it that was visible to all

subject: Sporedome encampment
fact: The tunnel opens up into a vast cavern at Sporedome.
source_quote: The tunnel opens up into a vast cavern

subject: fungal forest
fact: A great fungal forest spreads out in the Sporedome cavern with stalks reaching heights of 20 feet and beyond.
source_quote: A great fungal forest spreads out on the ground as far as you can see, with some stalks reaching heights of 20 feet and beyond

subject: Sporedome lake
fact: Dim waters of a large lake are surrounded by the fungus in Sporedome.
source_quote: you can see the dim waters of a large lake surrounded by the fungus

subject: drow
fact: Several hundred feet to the east of the lake, tents have been erected in a hastily built camp in Sporedome.
source_quote: Several hundred feet to the east, tents have been erected in a hastily built camp

subject: myconids
fact: A large colony of myconids resides in the fungal forest of Sporedome.
source_quote: The fungal forest is also resident to a large colony of myconids

subject: drow-myconid relations
fact: The drow and the myconid have not yet engaged in any talks in Sporedome.
source_quote: The drow and the myconid have not yet engaged in any talks

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: In a cave under the Black Ember Outpost is a lake and the entrance to the secret passageway into Maerimydra.
source_quote: In an cave under the outpost is a lake and the entrance to the secret passageway into Maerimydra

subject: Pathway of Shadows
fact: The Pathway of Shadows is a secret pathway that Solom Ned'razak built to leave the Shattered Tower and Maerimydra undetected.
source_quote: A secret pathway that Solom Ned'razak built to leave the Shattered Tower and Maerimydra undetected

subject: Shattered Tower
fact: The Shattered Tower is the location in Maerimydra where the Pathway of Shadows ends.
source_quote: Location in Maerimydra where the Pathway of Shadows ends

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: The Shattered Tower was the old tower of Solom Ned'razak.
source_quote: Old tower of Solom Ned'razak

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning is a tower of sheer basalt.
source_quote: A tower of sheer basalt

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The top of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning has a glowing green room.
source_quote: at the top had a glowing green room

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The tower was a place of law under the Drow regime.
source_quote: The tower was a place of law under the Drow regime

subject: glowing green room
fact: The green glowing green room is a teleportation circle.
source_quote: The green glowing green room is a teleportation circle

subject: Watcher's eye brooch
fact: The Watcher's eye brooch is attuned to the defensive wards of the Tower of the Blades.
source_quote: The brooch is attuned to the defensive wards of the Tower of the Blades

subject: Watcher's eye brooch
fact: The Watcher's eye brooch is the seat of government in Mulmaster.
source_quote: the seat of government in Mulmaster

subject: Watcher's eye brooch
fact: The Watcher's eye brooch allows the wearer to bypass certain lethal magical defenses designed to vaporize intruders.
source_quote: It allows the wearer to bypass certain lethal magical defenses designed to vaporize intruders

fact: The Timepiece of Maram il Vass is an hourglass.
source_quote: An hourglass

source_quote: that represents the total time available to secure the Lexicon of Oaths

fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is a book that contains information that Maram il Vass requires.

fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is currently possessed by Vraxen.

fact: Vraxen is managing Graz'zt's deal with the Fire Giants.

fact: Solom Ned'razak is a powerful drow wizard.

fact: Solom Ned'razak rules Szith Morcane.
source_quote: who rules Szith Morcane

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak uses the present tense when speaking of his home.
source_quote: He uses the present tense when speaking of his home

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak firmly believes the invaders will be pushed back.
source_quote: he firmly believes the invaders will be pushed back

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak hopes that the ritual is going to be the key that they need to accomplish that goal.
source_quote: he hopes that the ritual is going to be the key that they need to accomplish that goal

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak is ruthless and efficient in his dealings.
source_quote: He is ruthless and efficient in his dealings

fact: Solom Ned'razak detests dealing with non-drow.
source_quote: but understands circumstances have left him no choice

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak understands circumstances have left him no choice.
source_quote: but understands circumstances have left him no choice

fact: Xaven Tanor'this was saved from Maram il Vass.
source_quote: that was saved from Maram il Vass

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is a long time collaborator of Solom's.
source_quote: and a long time collaborator of Solom's

fact: Xaven Tanor'this knowledge is key to create an antidote to the demonic infused Fire Giant blood.
